mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM auth_user_role ur INNER JOIN auth_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ur.id ASC
SELECT ur.user_id FROM auth_user_role ur INNER JOIN auth_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE r.role_code = #{roleCode} ORDER BY ur.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO auth_user_role(id, user_id, role_id, create_time) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{roleId}, NOW())
